name: cef-standard
description: Parses Common Event Format (CEF) logs used by security products like ArcSight, Trend Micro, and many SIEM integrations

test_samples.description: UniFi intrusion CEF: src/dst/spt/dpt/act extension fields are split out
test_samples.input: CEF:0|Ubiquiti|UniFi Network|9.0.108|1|Intrusion Detected|7|src=203.0.113.5 dst=198.51.100.10 spt=55000 dpt=443 proto=TCP act=blocked msg=ET SCAN Potential SSH Scan

test_samples.description: Trend Micro Deep Security CEF: suser maps to user
test_samples.input: CEF:0|Trend Micro|Deep Security Agent|10.0|100|Eicar_test_file|6|src=198.51.100.9 dst=203.0.113.7 suser=jdoe act=Quarantine

metadata.author: siembox
metadata.log_source: Common Event Format (CEF) security events (ArcSight, Trend Micro, etc.)
